title: carthamus glaucus subsp. anatolicus
intro: Carthamus glaucus subsp. anatolicus is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is commonly known as Anatolian safflower or Turkish safflower, and its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carthamus glaucus subsp. anatolicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions including digestive issues and skin problems.
